app.title: Pirates
app.titleFull: Pirates – Pegya, Master of the Caribbean!
app.subtitle: Pegya, the pirate of Zenta
app.tagline: A Vojvodinian heart on the Caribbean Sea — sail, cannon, paprika.

career.name: Captain name
career.hint: Default: Pegya, the pirate of Zenta

world.nearPort: Near {{port}} — tap the anchor to dock

tanya.title: The Zenta homestead
tanya.greeting: Anikó runs out to meet you, the two girls laughing by candlelight.
tanya.rested: You slept in a clean bed. +{{morale}} morale, +{{food}} food.
tanya.gaveGold: Tears well up in Anikó's eyes: "Thank you, Pegya."
tanya.notEnoughGold: You don't have that much gold.
tanya.playedWithGirls: An hour of hide-and-seek in the cornfield. Pegya's heart grows full. +{{fame}} fame.
tanya.letterIntro: "My dear Pegya! The girls asked about the sea again today. Csillag learned a new song, Boróka watches over the cat. Take care of yourself — we wait for you." — Anikó

tavern.title: The Csárda
tavern.flavor: The innkeeper offers a bowl of paprika stew. A cimbalom plays by the hearth.

merchant.title: Merchant stall
merchant.subtitle: {{name}}'s wares, at {{port}}'s market
merchant.flavor: "I buy, I sell — never tobacco, always tobacco!" — Uncle Gyuri, the merchant

shipyard.title: Shipwright — Lőrinc Kovács's workshop
shipyard.subtitle: "A good ship is like a good wife: both need upkeep."
shipyard.patchDone: Ship patched. You can sail tomorrow.
shipyard.repaired: Ship is shipshape — gleams like Danube water.

governor.title: Governor's palace
governor.ballInvite: His daughter invites you to dance…

naval.title: Naval battle
naval.cryRally: Come on, lads! Zenta blood never runs like water!

land.title: City siege
land.victory: The town has fallen! Pegya's flag flies on the tower.
land.anikoLetter: "I knew you could do it. Come home. — Anikó"

tutorial.move: Tap anywhere on the water to sail there.
tutorial.wind: Small arrows show wind direction — into it you sail slower.
tutorial.port: Tap the anchor to dock at a port.
tutorial.combat: In combat positioning is everything: turn broadside to use your cannons.
tutorial.home: Zenta is your home — Anikó and the girls wait there. Visit often!

backstory.title: Pegya's Legend
backstory.paragraph1: Zenta, 1678. Born on the banks of the Tisza, Pegya was a fisherman like his father and grandfather. Quick-witted, brave of heart, and never silent of tongue, he stood out in the village. During the Ottoman-Habsburg clashes, raiders struck the farm one night — Pegya protected Anikó, the miller's daughter, but their house burned down.
backstory.paragraph2: They fled west for months, to Trieste, and boarded a ship. The ship lost its way, and within months Pegya was walking the deck on the Caribbean Sea. Two daughters were born on the long voyage: Csillag, whose eyes shine like the night sky, and Boróka, as stubborn as a juniper tree.
backstory.paragraph3: Pegya signed on as a sailor with a Spanish captain, but the captain cheated him out of his wages. On a stormy night, Pegya took over the ship and raised his own flag: red, blue, and yellow bands, with a sunflower in the middle. Since then, no one dares cross the pirate of Zenta on the Caribbean.
backstory.paragraph4: Anikó and the girls wait on an abandoned homestead by the Caribbean shore — Pegya christened it Zenta. From here he sails to every adventure, and returns after every battle. This is his story.

szabadka.flavor: The heart of Bácska — a big market, a bigger tongue.

ujvidek.flavor: Capital of the English colony. Ornate buildings, even more ornate politics.

nagybecskerek.flavor: Grain stores, wine cellars — load up your ship and she'll sail to England.

zombor.flavor: Spanish governor, golden chains, suspicion. No one trusts anyone here.

pancsova.flavor: School of cannon masters — if you have coin, you learn to shoot here.

versec.flavor: In the shadow of the Spanish fort, sugarcane grows — and conspiracy.

kikinda.flavor: Rum distillery, sailors, lovers. The very air is intoxicating.

obecse.flavor: Spice warehouse. The paprika dust will hit your eyes before you bargain the price.

apatin.flavor: A fishing port turned Spanish supply base. Powder, barrels, danger.

magyarkanizsa.flavor: Linen weavers and Hungarian peasant girls — their purses loose with Dutch coin.

fehertemplom.flavor: Tobacco fields, white walls, black hearts.

temerin.flavor: The Spanish main port. Silver fleets dock here.

szenttamas.flavor: A small town with a big weaving mill.

palics.flavor: The beloved little resort. They rarely fire here, often dance.

ada.flavor: French textiles, French perfumes — Pegya buys kerchiefs here for Anikó.

torokbecse.flavor: French rum distillery. The innkeeper is an old friend of Pegya's.

csoka.flavor: Spice, swamp, mosquitoes. Small but valuable.

kula.flavor: Dutch cloth stalls and barely-hidden smuggling.

martonos.flavor: Dutch powder magazine — careful with the pipe!

horgos.flavor: Pirate haven: no one asks where you came from.

zenta.flavor: Pegya's home. Anikó cooks paprikás, Csillag and Boróka play in the small forest.
